# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Wildcard Trust Policy

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID
    Default: o-*
  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the IAM Role
    Default: CICDCrossAccountRole

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/PowerUserAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDDeploymentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - cloudformation:*
                  - s3:*
                  - lambda:*
                  - apigateway:*
                  - dynamodb:*
                  - ec2:Describe*
                  - ecr:*
                  - ecs:*
                  - logs:*
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                  - ssm:GetParameters
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: '*'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICD
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD Cross-Account Role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD Cross-Account Role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-RoleName
